name: Subbulakshmi Saravanan
title: Founder & CEO
address: No. 5, Kamarajar Salai, Anna Nagar, Madurai – 625 020
bio: Subbulakshmi Saravanan established Prithvi Real Estate in 2012 with a commitment to eco-friendly and sustainable property development in Madurai and surrounding Tamil Nadu districts. With a background in land surveying and legal consultation, she brings unmatched expertise in DTCP approvals, agricultural land deals, and rural-to-urban plot development.
